title: Academic Catalogs
description: A catalog listing of the courses offered by an organization.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: A global identifier of an academic catalog for use in all external references.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of an academic catalog.

description.title: Description
description.description: A full description of an academic catalog.

code.title: Code
code.description: The code that identifies an academic catalog.

startOn.title: Start Date
startOn.description: The beginning date for when an academic catalog takes effect.

endOn.title: End Date
endOn.description: The ending date for when an academic catalog is no longer in effect.

status.title: Status
status.description: A status of an academic catalog. Not currently in use.

institution.title: Institution
institution.description: The educational institution that owns the academic catalog

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Institution.

academicPrograms.title: Academic Programs
academicPrograms.description: Academic programs that make up the catalog.

items.title: Academic Programs
items.description: Academic programs that make up the catalog.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Academic Programs.
